dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8564 IH: Local Law Enforcement Support Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Wagner (for herself and Mr. Rutherford) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To expand funding opportunities for local law enforcement, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Local Law Enforcement Support Act of 2026.

section.header: Funding opportunities for Byrne JAG Program and COPS
section.text: Section 100054(5) of Public Law 119–21 (139 Stat. 390) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in clause (iii), by striking the period and inserting a semicolon; and
by adding at the end the following:

clause.text: recruiting, hiring, training, and retaining law enforcement personnel;
acquiring protective equipment for law enforcement personnel;
increasing capacity to combat digital crimes and enhancing capabilities to support cyber investigations including the acquisition of—
supporting the use of drone and counter-drone law enforcement operations;
expanding the availability of forensic technologies and other investigative equipment including the acquisition of—

subclause.text: ballistics analysis equipment compatible with the National Integrated Ballistic Information Network;
rapid DNA instruments (as defined by 34 U.S.C. 40702(c)(3));

clause.text: enhancing communication with and providing services to victims of violent crime.
